nasb.text: nor shall he go out of the sanctuary nor profane the sanctuary of his God, for the consecration of the anointing oil of his God is on him; I am the Lord.

esv.text: He shall not go out of the sanctuary, lest he profane the sanctuary of his God, for the consecration of the anointing oil of his God is on him: I am the Lord.

cnv.text: 他不可走出聖所，也不可褻瀆他　神的聖所，因為他　神膏立了他，使他分別為聖，我是耶和華。

ccb.text: 他不可因丧事走出他上帝的圣所，以免亵渎圣所，因为我的膏油已经使他圣洁。我是耶和华。
